title: verbascum syriacum
intro: Verbascum syriacum, also known as Syrian mullein or giant mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family and is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Verbascum syriacum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Verbascum syriacum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
